response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack experience and geospatial project involvement, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing or navigation systems, has no demonstrated work with routing tiling, map data pipelines, or distributed systems for geospatial data, and their primary stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang — none of which match the core requirement of modern C++ for this role.
strengths: Experience building open-source GIS platforms with real-world usage
Strong background in distributed systems and low-latency applications using DLang
Proven ability to work across technical stacks and contribute to dev-ops infrastructure
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ or Rust development in routing or geospatial pipelines
Lacks demonstrated experience with routing tile generation or navigation data freshness systems
Primary technical stack (TypeScript, DLang) does not align with core requirement of C++
